Export.zv: Cache for UNIX (Red Hat Enterprise Linux for x86-64) 2014.1.3 (Build 775)
Export.Routine: DVPTCPL ;;DAL/BNT - Digital Veterans Platform TCP Utilities ; 5/19/2017 ;;1.0;DIGITAL VETERANS PLATFORM;****; ;Per VHA directive 2004-038, this routine should not be modified. QUIT ; ; -- Important: Should always be JOBed using START^DVPTCP LISTENER(DVPPORT,DVPCFG) ; -- Start Listener ; ; -- quit if not Cache for NT IF $$GETOS^DVPTCP()'="OpenM-NT" QUIT ; NEW $ETRAP,$ESTACK SET $ETRAP="D ^%ZTER HALT" ; NEW X,POP,DVPDA,U,DTIME,DT,DVPIO SET U="^",DTIME=900,DT=$$DT^XLFDT() IF $GET(DUZ)="" NEW DUZ SET DUZ=.5,DUZ(0)="@" ; ; -- only start if not already started IF $$LOCK^DVPTCP(DVPPORT) DO . IF $$OPENM(.DVPIO,DVPPORT) DO . . ; -- listener started and now stopping . . SET IO=DVPIO . . DO CLOSE^%ZISTCP . . ; -- update status to 'stopped' . . DO UPDATE^DVPTCP(DVPPORT,4,$GET(DVPCFG)) . ELSE DO . . ; -- listener failed to start . . ; -- update status to 'failed' . . DO UPDATE^DVPTCP(DVPPORT,5,$GET(DVPCFG)) . ; . DO UNLOCK^DVPTCP(DVPPORT) QUIT ; ; -- open/start listener port OPENM(DVPIO,DVPPORT) ; NEW DVPBOX,%ZA SET DVPBOX=+$$GETBOX^DVPTCP() SET DVPIO="|TCP|"_DVPPORT OPEN DVPIO:(:DVPPORT:"AT"):30 ; ; -- if listener port could not be opened then gracefully quit ; (other namespace using port maybe?) IF '$TEST QUIT 0 ; ; -- read & spawn loop FOR DO QUIT:$$EXIT(DVPBOX,DVPPORT) . USE DVPIO . READ *X:60 IF '$TEST QUIT . ; Removed JOB for temporary testing. Change this back. . ;D CHILDNT^DVPTCPL() SET %ZA=$ZA . JOB CHILDNT^DVPTCPL():(:4:DVPIO:DVPIO):10 SET %ZA=$ZA . IF %ZA\8196#2=1 WRITE *-2 ;Job failed to clear bit QUIT 1 ; CHILDNT() ;Child process for OpenM NEW DVPEC SET $ETRAP="D ^%ZTER L HALT" SET IO=$PRINCIPAL ;Reset IO to be $P USE IO:(::"-M") ;Packet mode like DSM ; -- do quit to save a stack level SET DVPEC=$$NEWOK() IF DVPEC DO LOGINERR(DVPEC,IO) IF 'DVPEC DO VAR,SPAWN^DVPVLL QUIT ; VAR ;Setup IO variables SET IO(0)=IO,IO(1,IO)="",POP=0 SET IOT="TCP",IOF="#",IOST="P-TCP",IOST(0)=0 QUIT ; NEWOK() ;Is it OK to start a new process NEW XQVOL,XUCI,XUENV,XUVOL,X,Y,DVPCODE DO XUVOL^XUS IF $$INHIB1^XUSRB() QUIT 181004 IF $$INHIB2^XUSRB() QUIT 181003 QUIT 0 ; ; -- process error LOGINERR(DVPEC,DVPPORT) ; DO ERROR^DVPVLL(DVPEC,$$EZBLD^DIALOG(DVPEC),DVPPORT) ; ; -- give client time to process stream HANG 2 QUIT ; EXIT(DVPBOX,DVPPORT) ; ; -- is status 'stopping' ; -- Commented out Q 0 QUIT ($PIECE($GET(^XOB(18.04,+$$GETLOGID(DVPBOX,DVPPORT),0)),U,3)=3) ; GETLOGID(DVPBOX,DVPPORT) ; ; -- Commented out Q 0 QUIT +$ORDER(^XOB(18.04,"C",DVPBOX,DVPPORT,"")) ;
